overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing an armored character walking through a commercial kitchen or cafeteria interior. The character moves from a storage area through a prep kitchen past a service counter toward an exit doorway. The environment features industrial metal shelving, kitchen islands, and warm artificial lighting typical of a spaceship or station setting.

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a back storage room with metal shelving units and a sink. An NPC crouching near the shelves stands up as the character approaches and walks forward through the space.

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a commercial kitchen area featuring a central prep island with stacked white trays. The space opens up with industrial ovens visible in the background and a service window showing an exterior vehicle.

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a service counter where an NPC sits working under a desk lamp. An exit doorway becomes visible ahead as the character progresses past the kitchen area.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the exit doorway, passing the service counter behind, and prepares to enter the corridor beyond. The doorway frame fills the view as the character reaches the transition point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a functional spaceship interior that transitions from a cramped storage room into an expansive commercial kitchen and finally toward an exit. It begins in a back storage area filled with metal shelving and a sink, where a crouching NPC stands up as the character moves forward. As the character advances, the space opens up into a prep kitchen featuring a central island with stacked white trays and industrial ovens, while a service window reveals a vehicle outside. The camera then glides along a service counter past an NPC working under a desk lamp before the view shifts toward a distant exit doorway. Finally, the character approaches the doorway, leaving the kitchen area behind as the frame of the exit fills the view.
